members.label: chair
members.description: multiple wooden dining chairs around the table
members.long_form_open_description: Several matching wooden dining chairs with carved backs and dark finish, arranged around the dining table; visible silhouettes show seat backs and some chair legs, oriented facing the table and camera.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: surrounding the dining table at the end of the hallway; one chair back visible centrally in the doorway

members.label: chair
members.description: set of carved wooden dining chairs with decorative backs and upholstered seats
members.long_form_open_description: Multiple matching carved wooden chairs (ornate backs, dark finish) surrounding the dining table; visible chair backs face toward the camera and some seats show dark upholstery. Chairs are proportionate to a traditional dining set.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Arranged around the dining table; closest chairs are immediately in front of the table and aligned inside the framed doorway.
